## Checklist

- [ ] The base branch matches the workflow: feature, bugfix and documentation PRs target `develop`; hotfix PRs target `main`.
- [ ] I linked the relevant issue or explained why there is none.
- [ ] I updated documentation or comments where useful.
- [ ] I ran the relevant checks locally.
